entry.title: view which account my sold-to party is linked to in FD32
entry.content:
view which account my sold-to party is linked to in FD32

what do I click in the menu to view the sold to party for my ship to party in transaction FD32

entry.title: Re: Best practice how to deal with action parameters in R...
entry.content:
In the meantime we have found a solution that works for us. We also reached out to SAP to find if there was a best practice, but the answer was there wasn't. Because a URL can have a max length, we thought it was not a good idea to pass all the input parameters via a URL.

Therefore we came up with the following.

In case we want to build functionality that needs to run in a job, we make use of Application Jobs. Application Jobs accept range tables.
We created a custom table in S/4 where we store the job template name and a so called variant (same as we had with reports). The other fields are the parameter name, sign, option, low and high.
This table is then used to store all the input parameters where we have all the flexibility as with a Z-program. The table can be populated with a Fiori Elements app and SM30 dialog.

We then created a custom RAP service that contains 2 actions:
- scheduleJob (accepts a job template name and a variant, returns a job name and a job count)
- checkJobStatus (accepts a job name and a job count, returns JobRunning, JobFinished or JobFinishedWithError

Within the action scheduleJob we read the custom table based on the job template name and variant we poplate the internal table needed to pass the input parameters to the application job.

cl_apj_rt_api=>schedule_job(
EXPORTING
iv_job_template_name = lva_jobtemplatename
iv_job_text = |{ lva_jobtemplatename }|
is_start_info = lst_start_info
it_job_parameter_value = lta_job_parameters
IMPORTING
ev_jobname = DATA(lva_job_name)
ev_jobcount = DATA(job_count)
).

With the action checkJobStatus we check the status of the job by reading the table TBTCO with the key fields job name and job count.
When the status is 'R' it means it is still running, with 'F' it is finished and with 'A' it is aborted.

This way we have all the flexibility we need when scheduling background functionality and passing all possible input parameters via a URL.

entry.title: Re: loadProcedure is not a function
entry.content: All uses the xsjs. Even most recent tutorials from SAP

entry.title: Re: EWM Table for Material and Pack spec
Re: EWM Table for Material and Pack spec
entry.content:
Hello Ellen,

I had the same question a while ago and I linked the tables in this way:

/SCWM/PVPAKL-MATID that's my packaging material and what I used as a selection criteria.

/SCWM/PVPAKL-PVGUID with POSVID-PVGUID.
POSVID-NAMEID or PNGUID with /SCWM/PAPAK-ELEMENTGROUP.
/SCWM/PAPAK-PAGUID with PALTID-PAGUID
PALTID-PGUID can be linked to PNODID-PNGUID or /1CN/CPSSAPIBD01-PS_GUID or /SCWM/PNPAKH-PNGUID

In my case I wanted to know which packaging instructions and final products where packed for a list of packaging materials, so the information I was looking for was in the table /1CN/CPSSAPIBD01.

entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing one issue while processing Intercompany sales order to Invoice through IDOC, we got one error "Charactersistic Value does not exist for characteristic KDPOS" KSPOS means sales order item.

we check in WE02 with IDOC number and it says

I checked the sales order in sending company code but the actual sales order item 40 doesn't exist and it is trying to push to the receiving company code.

Could anyone please help me. Its urgent.

Regards,

Govindu Uday

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content:
SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition for SAP Business Network

A new App is now available on SAP Store - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition for SAP Business Network. It enables existing SAP Business Network customers to avail at free 1 block (10K documents) of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition. SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition allows SAP Business Network customers to receive supplier invoices from local tax authorities in selected countries. For capabilities beyond integration with SAP Business Network or additional document requirements, a separate full license of SAP Document Reporting and Compliance, cloud edition is required.

Review the store page for pre-requisites, solution capabilities and terms and conditions. For more details, kindly refer other 2 links below.

  • SAP Store - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition for SAP Business Network
  • Blog Post - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Cloud or On-Premise? Not an “either or” option, but a streamlined solution for electronic compliance!
  • SAP Help - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition

entry.title: Re: UI5 Tips: Use of Binding Suspend
entry.content:
This has helped me binding a combobox to an odata v2-Model with both a static filter defined in the XML-View and a dynamic filter in the Controller.

Both get combined in the odata-query with "and" (the filter from the view becomes an "application"-filter, the one from the controller a "control"-filter, see the description from the ODataListBinding filter-method).

XML-View:

 

<ComboBox
	id="comboList" 
	items="{ path : '/DataSet', 
		     filters : [{ path : 'Deleted', operator : 'EQ', value1 : false }],
			 templateShareable : false,
			 suspended : true }">
	<core:ListItem key="{Id}" text="{Descr}" />
</ComboBox>

 

Controller (using variable sGroupId as dynamic filter value):

 

this.byId("comboList").getBinding("items").filter([new Filter("GroupId", FilterOperator.EQ, sGroupId)]);

 

I didn't need to resume the binding, since actions like filter or paging doesn't get suspended (see here).

entry.title: Re: CPIDS and S/4 HANA Integration

entry.title: Poland - Sales billing
entry.content:
Sap states (see note 3344638) that there would be different rules for VAT and CIT regarding the applicable exchange rate. But according to our information, both legislations state that the rate of the last working day before the date that services have been rendered is to be used.

Does anybody has a clear view on this?

entry.title: Connect PO7.5 to Integration Suite?
entry.content:
Hi,

At my customer side we currently have multiple interfaces like ECC backend <=> SAP PO <=> 3rd party
Customer will switch part of the operation to S4HANA and also wants to move from SAP PO to Integration Suite on BTP.

But some of 3rd party connections are really quite complicated and might even be changed in 1 to 2 years, so i feel like the effort to move all of that to IS now, and then still change it later on is not worth the effort.

So what i'm thinking about is a split in some interfaces where we start using IS and PO together.
That will look like S4 <=> IS <=> PO <=> 3rd party.

This way i,
1) only connect S4 to IS (and not also to PO)
2) dont have to worry about the complicated stuff that is between PO and 3rd party
3) take up the work of connecting IS to 3rd party when the time has come for that change they will make

Of course it requires me copy all ICO's on PO to not have ECC as sender (mostly idocs by the way) but have Integration Suite as sender.
So that is some extra work.

Any thoughts on this way of working?
Can i just create HTTP connections between PO and IS to accomplish this scenario?

Any comments are appreciated

Kr

Robert

entry.title: Re: Receiving error while adding new ABAP Cloud Project in Eclipse using Service Key
entry.content: Can you check whether this tutorial is more helpful for you? https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-trial-onboarding.html. Additionally please ensure please ensure to use the newest version of ADT and maybe you can also check via the SAP BTP Trial cockpit whether an ABAP service instance was actually created

entry.title: Where can I learn more about the value and capabilities of SAP Cloud ALM for Operation?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Operating with SAP Cloud ALM learning journey learning journey

Overview
In this learning journey, you'll learn more about the value and capabilities of SAP Cloud ALM for Operations, which consists of features, functions, and processes for operating your cloud-centric and hybrid SAP solution landscapes.

Starting with an overview, we'll explain monitoring and analysis, as well as Business Service Management and Event Management capabilities. We'll show you how SAP Cloud ALM for Operations provides you with a central entry point to ensure transparent integrations throughout your SAP solution landscapes, and how to manage your business processes. This is to ensure business continuity, increase operational efficiency by automating operational tasks, and avoid anomalies by proactive problem prediction.

The learning journey also gives an overview on the different integration possibilities of SAP Cloud ALM for Operations to comprise an overall ALM process.

Learning objectives
This course will enable you to:

  • Get a detailed overview on all the capabilities, features and functions of SAP Cloud ALM for Operations.
  • Understand all use cases of SAP Cloud ALM for Operations, their application purpose, and current possibilities during the application usage.
  • Get a first insight and hands-on experience by using the SAP Cloud ALM for Operations demo system.
  • Learn about general integration possibilities of SAP Cloud ALM for Operations.

Prerequisites

  • Basic Knowledge of Application Lifecycle Management
  • Basic Knowledge of technical operations
  • Optional Learning Journey: Introducing SAP Cloud ALM

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Developer Challenge: SAP HANA multi-model using Python in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content: This was great insight and a well prepared topic. Thank you Vitaliy!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA – Clean core with/and SAP BTP

Hi
I would suggest to reference at least those learning journeys

Managing Clean Core and Practicing Clean Core (intermediate) 

regards

Amaury

entry.title: How Can AI In Manufacturing Boost Supply Chain Efficiency?
entry.content:
In the fast-paced world of business, it's crucial for companies to embrace modern technologies to remain competitive and scale. This is particularly true for manufacturing companies who often have complex processes involving time-consuming activities around quality control and compliance standards.

And while repetitive tasks on the production line might seem essential to ensure high-quality, low-cost products, it can also become monotonous for the workforce, potentially leading to errors and poor-quality products.

Incorporating advanced automation can be a game changer. And cutting-edge technologies like artificial intelligence, when used properly, can help boost efficiency for manufacturers and their supply chain operations.

According to a global 2024 IDC InfoBrief, ‘‘The importance of AI in Supply Chain and Operations”, 63% of supply chain executives and 52% of operations executives have an AI strategy linked to business objectives.

Business AI, such as SAP's Joule, is an example of a generative AI copilot that integrates into various business processes, from HR, and finances to the supply chain and other operations. Cutting edge tools like Joule have the capability to help boost business performance by rapidly and efficiently enhancing new product ideas using natural language queries.

On a factory floor, Business AI can help:

  • Optimize Asset Maintenance to reduce maintenance costs and extend the life of key equipment pieces.
  • Enable Agile Production Planning, by integrating AI for enhanced scheduling and forecasting to boost operational efficiency
  • Improve Visual inspection processes to improve the quality of products and thus improve customer satisfaction.

 

Leveraging AI for Visual Inspection in Manufacturing

By utilizing AI-assisted visual inspection solutions—where cameras, AI algorithms, and the power of the cloud converge—it's easy to check components for defects with one single click.

When a single hair or a drop of water can be detected as a defect, AI-assisted visual checks bring an enormous value by detecting every defect without additional manual control required. Once simply marked as defective or intact and routed accordingly, making a significant difference comparing to workers bear full responsibility of inspections. Identifying nonconformances early and taking the right decision helps your organization produce high-quality products.

Smart Press Shop, an automotive component manufacturer is an example of a company that implemented SAP Digital Manufacturing solution for execution together with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition. They are improving quality with AI-assisted visual inspection, which helps them become more competitive in the automotive industry.

‘‘It becomes a completely different job for employees than when they bear full responsibility,” said Hendrik Rothe, Managing Director of Smart Press Shop GmbH & Co. “It’s a huge added value for customers.’’

Benefits of AI in Manufacturing

An automated process significantly reduces inspection time, allowing for the production of more components in a shorter period of time. Powered by AI, inspections are done in real time, can easily recognize the issues and with high accuracy can identify the defect. It doesn’t require additional worker control, so limits manual work and saves space for more value-added and creative jobs.

Automation also creates a more efficient and cost-effective production process by reducing unnecessary work and waste. In an industry where just-in-time manufacturing is a key requirement, this provides a significant competitive advantage, adding substantial value for both customers and companies, while also contributing to increased customer satisfaction.

Innovations nowadays are expected to be implemented within days. One of the key benefits of AI in Manufacturing is that it eliminates the need for IT hardware installation at the manufacturing site, which simplifies maintenance and operations. This, in turn, makes the company more agile because it can rapidly switch between models. The machine learning model can be easily trained using a couple of images and then quickly deployed, eliminating the need for special skills and reducing the time required to implement the solution. In case of AI-assisted visual inspection, once the cameras have been installed, it can be used immediately.

As a manufacturer's reputation directly depends on the quality of their products, AI has the potential to improve productivity and quality significantly by identifying errors with high accuracy. Being up to date with modern technologies provides businesses with an opportunity to reduce risks, increase customer satisfaction, and grow.

Download the IDC InfoBrief to learn more about the importance of AI in Supply Chain.

entry.title: How to create schedule lines in CLID template under scheduling agreement in SAP Ariba Contract
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to create CLID template for Scheduling Agreement, we know at header lever, we have options of Document Category - Scheduling Agreement and Document Type - LP/LPA.

We want to know how to add schedule lines in CLID templates for scheduling agreement in SAP Ariba Contract and how Line item template changes for scheduling agreement.?

Please provide support document to create CLID template with schedule line for scheduling agreement.

Regards

Amit R Nagwekar

entry.title: activate IDOC service path in S4 for IDOC receiver connection with CI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are working on SOAP -> IDOC scenario in Cloud Integration(SAP Integration Suite).

As a pre-requisite, we are trying to establish the IDOC connection from "Cloud Integration" to S4.

But we notice that activation of IDOC service path ‘/sap/bc/srt/idoc’ in SAP backend is needed.

But, our BASIS team declines our request stating that it is not allowed as per our organization hardening guidelines. They are asking to find an alternative way to achieve the required functionality.

Could you please let me know the alternate options available to achieve the requirement without additional efforts like interface redesign etc., Thank you!

Regards,

Ramu

entry.title: Re: SELECT ROW at REUSE ALV
entry.content: No problem. Free online translators to English are good enough anyway. Could you please give more details, what is your code and what "standard screen" are you talking about? PS: there are no methods implied when it's about function modules.

entry.title: Re: API_BUSINESS_PARTNER after ES 2402 Ugprade
entry.content:
Hi JuliaLu.

I haven't checked for OData API API_BUSINESS_PARTNER, but in S4HPC 2404 Business Object i_businesspartnertp_3 is definitely working fine. 

So if you in 3SL (not in BTP) you can use EML instead, and that will work even faster. 

Hope is helpful.

Regards

Vitali

Examples: 

* Create Business Partner
    DATA: lt_businesspartner TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE i_businesspartnertp_3.

    DATA(lv_bp_cid) = cl_uuid_factory=>create_system_uuid( )->create_uuid_x16( ).
    DATA(lv_addr_cid) = cl_uuid_factory=>create_system_uuid( )->create_uuid_x16( ).

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_businesspartnertp_3
      ENTITY businesspartner
      CREATE FIELDS ( businesspartner
                      businesspartneruuid
                      fullname
                      businesspartnerforedit
                      businesspartnergrouping
                      businesspartnercategory
                      formofaddressorganization
                      organizationbpname1
                      organizationbpname2
                      bplastnamesearchhelp
                      lastname  )
        WITH VALUE #( ( %cid = lv_bp_cid
                        businesspartner = '9990000998'
                        businesspartneruuid = cl_uuid_factory=>create_system_uuid( )->create_uuid_x16( )
                        fullname = 'Test BusinessPartner'
                        businesspartnerforedit = '9990000998'
                        businesspartnergrouping = 'BPEE'
                        businesspartnercategory = '1'
                        organizationbpname1 = 'TEST'
                        organizationbpname2 = 'TEST'
                        bplastnamesearchhelp = 'TEST'
                        lastname = 'Test' ) )
      CREATE BY \_businesspartneraddress
      FIELDS ( businesspartner
               country
               cityname
               housenumber
               postalcode  )
        WITH VALUE #( ( %cid_ref = lv_bp_cid
                        %target = VALUE #( ( %cid = lv_addr_cid
                                             businesspartner = '9990000998'
                                             country = 'IN'
                                             cityname = 'Bangalore'
                                             housenumber = '10'
                                             postalcode = '560007' ) ) ) )
      MAPPED DATA(lt_mapped)
      FAILED DATA(lt_failed)
      REPORTED DATA(lt_reported).

    COMMIT ENTITIES RESPONSE OF i_businesspartnertp_3
     FAILED DATA(failed_commit)
     REPORTED DATA(reported_commit).

* Delete Business Partner
    READ ENTITIES OF i_businesspartnertp_3 "root
      ENTITY businesspartner
      ALL FIELDS WITH VALUE #( ( businesspartner = '9980000193' ) )
      RESULT DATA(lt_read_result)
      FAILED DATA(lt_read_failed)
      REPORTED DATA(lt_read_reported).

* Read Business Partner
    READ ENTITIES OF i_businesspartnertp_3
      ENTITY businesspartner
      ALL FIELDS WITH VALUE #( ( businesspartner = '0010100001' ) )
      RESULT DATA(lt_result)
      FAILED DATA(lt_failed)
      REPORTED DATA(lt_reported).

entry.title: Re: Can I rename this log file without any issues?

You can delete but it will have to be re-created.

https://me.sap.com/notes/0002460796

entry.title: Standard Function Module for Notification Create and Change
entry.content:
Please help/provide me with the standard Function Module for change pointer use in notification create or change that is QM01, QM02. I want to trigger an IDOC via change pointer for ZSRMCOMPLAINT message type in DS4 Development system when Notification is created via QM01 or change via QM02. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Standard Function Module for Notification Create and...
entry.content:
Hi, 

thank you for the details provided.

Please goto transaction BAPI and check the available function modules there, at path:

>Quality Management 
>>Quality Notifications 

Like:

  • BAPI_QUALNOT_CREATE (CreateFromData2)
  • BAPI_QUALNOT_MODIFY_DATA (ModifyData)
  • BAPI_QUALNOT_SAVE (Save)

etc.

Have a nice day,
SAP Support
​***
​Read and follow the 'SAP Community Rules of Engagement' at
​https://www.sap.com/community/about/rules-of-engagement.html

entry.title: Re: Table Building Block no Footer Attribute for Aggregation Row
entry.content: I can confirm after speaking to SAP colleagues, this feature is currently not supported

entry.title: Unlock new levels of procurement efficiency: Globant releases new SAP Signavio Value Accelerator
entry.content:
In today's fast-paced global marketplace, businesses face increasing pressure to optimize their procurement processes. From sourcing raw materials to managing supplier relationships, procurement plays a critical role in a company's success. However, with the complexities of supply chains spanning across continents, achieving efficiency can be a daunting task. This is where global procurement optimization comes into play. 

Global procurement optimization refers to the strategic management of sourcing, purchasing, and supply chain activities on a global scale to maximize efficiency and minimize costs. It involves streamlining processes, leveraging technology, and fostering collaboration both internally and externally, and this is also where SAP Signavio’s value accelerators can support companies and their transformation journeys. SAP Signavio Value Accelerators are sets of content that are specific for a theme – such as a business challenge, process, product, industry – and help you accelerate the time to value of your transformation projects.  

Globant is a global technology services company specializing in digital and cognitive transformation and one of SAP Signavio’s most valued partners. We had the privilege to connect with Globant to discuss their strategy and their latest contribution to the market with their new SAP Signavio Process Intelligence value accelerator for the analysis of procure to pay in Oracle JD Edwards.  

We are proud to have you as our contributing partner to our value accelerators strategy, can you explain why you decided to support the initiative and how you are collaborating with our teams?  

As a digitally native company, we are passionate about the way tech can change industries, experiences, and lives.  Our deep, digital DNA allows us to bring innovation, ensure business value, and help our clients reduce time, cost and effort in process mining implementations. 

In your opinion, why is it important to deliver content and value accelerators? Do you see a need for companies to transform faster and smarter?  

With the current level of disruption that companies are experiencing, they constantly focus on finding new optimization opportunities. So, if we can help them identify and reduce bottlenecks, risks, operational issues, and implement best practices for process optimization, ultimately, we can help them accelerate time to value. 

What is the output of this initiative? Which value accelerator/s are we releasing?  

Globant has just released a new value accelerator for the analysis of procure to pay with Oracle JD Edwards which is specifically designed for the SAP Signavio Process Intelligence mining solution. 

The accelerator enables  100% transparency in the end-to-end procurement process. and is a deep dive analysis of the purchasing and billing process of Oracle JD Edwards. It captures events related to the different business objects. The entities involved in this process are purchase requisitions, purchase order items, goods receipts, invoices, invoice items, accounting documents and payments. Additionally, this value accelerator speeds up the time it takes to perform a complete procurement to pay process analysis and as a result, it can help improve service level agreements (SLAs) and compliance in purchases.  

Which assets/capabilities does this new value accelerator provide?  

The value accelerator delivers the following capabilities: 

  1. Tables and filters to extract 
  2. Data transformation templates 
  3. Objects and events collections 
  4. Process discovery and conformance 
  5. Metrics and dashboards  

 
Which specific use cases and customer pain points is this accelerator designed to address?  

Optimization of procure to pay process is the first use case and a typical example is when the company’s procurement process is taking longer than expected. The new value accelerator by Globant speeds up the process mining experience with SAP Signavio Process Intelligence, meaning opportunities to streamline and accelerate the process are promptly identified.  

Review of conformance levels is the second use case: how many purchase orders follow our conformance process? Are the products received on time and in full (OTIF)? Are there high maverick rates? By leveraging this new value accelerator companies are fully equipped to analyze the process fast and with low effort, unveiling deviations and improving compliance in purchases. 

Identification of automation opportunities and increase in automation rates, is our last most common use case. The accelerator quickly starts process mining, speeding up the time to get insights and full process understanding.  Companies can identify unnecessary manual tasks in the process that increase operational costs and introduce new levels of automation.  
 
It is important to note that this new value accelerator by Globant supports challenges related with maverick buying, standard procure to pay process analysis, non-conformance, SOX compliance, system migration in all industries. Roles from the Procurement area, SOX and Compliance, Finance, CFOs, vendors, and buyers can benefit from using this value accelerator. 
 
It can not be understated that global procurement optimization is not just a strategic initiative; it's a competitive necessity. By prioritizing efficiency, cost savings, risk mitigation, supplier collaboration, and strategic insights, businesses can unlock new opportunities for growth, innovation, and sustainability. As the global marketplace continues to evolve, organizations that embrace procurement optimization will gain a competitive edge and thrive in the face of uncertainty.  


The new SAP Signavio Process Intelligence value accelerator for Oracle JD Edwards by Globant can now be found in the value accelerator library for SAP Signavio solutions.

 For more information, please feel free to contact Rocio Ponce <rocio.ponce@globant.com>.

entry.content:

We are following below links.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/fiori-element-object-list-disable-navigation/qaq-p/12506350

entry.title: Re: Mass Processing functionality – delete all instances - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
entry.content:
Dear Elizaveta,

I have the same issue as Alexander, my migration was successful, but I had to delete the migrated data again (Internal orders). Now I cannot use the same project again since it will say "The data could not be entered into the staging tables because it already exists". So do I really have to open a new project? If so: What is the reason behind the block of deleting successfully migrated data? I dont see any benefit to that, because if we would try to migrate data twice it would show during migration.

Thank you very much!

Best regards,

 

Moritz

entry.title: In which table can I check the status of a condition contract?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a query regarding condition contract management:

In which table can I check the status of a condition contract?

I have tried to check in tables "WCOCOH" and "WCOCOF" but I couldn't find any field related to show status.

Kindly let me know if there's any table where I input a condition contract number and I can get the status (i.e., New, Locked, Released, etc) of the document.

Thanks in advance.

 

#S4HANA #conditioncontractmanagement

entry.title: import monitor error ehp8
entry.content:
Hi people,

I'm trying to install sap ides ehp8 ecc6.0 with MSSQL in a Windows server 2019 and the final of import presents me with 3 errors.

here are the logs.
Import_monitor.java.log

 

Java(TM) SE Runtime Environment (build 8.1.088)
SAP Java Server VM (build 8.1.088 11.0.15+000, May  6 2022 20:08:59 - 81_REL - optU - windows amd64 - 6 - bas2:333212 (mixed mode))

Import Monitor jobs: running 1, waiting 3, completed 223, failed 0, total 227.
Import Monitor jobs: running 2, waiting 2, completed 223, failed 0, total 227.

Loading of 'SAPAPPL0_26' import package: ERROR

Loading of 'SAPAPPL2_8' import package: ERROR

'SAPAPPL0_26' import package: ERROR

 

A2 ETSK 000 Starting create for object "STXH~REF" of type "index" #20240703151817

A1EEIMP 008 ON [STXH]

entry.title: Master Data Retrieval API - Flex Master Data Entity Name
entry.content:
Does anyone have experiences on retriving FMD records using SAP Ariba OpenAPI "Master Data Retrieval API for Procurement" ?

I checked entity name of the FMD using Endpoint "/entityTypes", I could see 4 digits number at the beginning of the entityname.
Does anyone know where is this number coming from? Is this different between Test and Prod ? It seems it's not from "vrealm" value.

{
"EntityName": "1234.fmd_11111.FmdName",
"Name": "fmd name"
},

entry.title: Statement assignment groups
entry.content:
Hi,

For the statements for countries, we created the statement assignment groups with the criteria for country and salary review category of the employees. Since these groups are dynamic in nature and due to any changes, that is happening in EC (within the criteria or conditions for statement assignment groups eg. country or salary review category), the users are getting unassigned from their original statement groups that were mapped initially and because of this even though their statements are generated employees are not able to view them in their respective EC profiles. These changes are happening frequently.

Is there any way to make the statement groups time bound, so that the users cannot get unassigned from their group even if there is a change in EC.

We are facing the gaps in the statement visibility of users, and this is being observed in every year's campaign. 

Please investigate and let us know if there is any possible solution for this.

entry.title: BAPI BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE is not update values for condition based on percentage discounts.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to update condition records on Purchasing contracts using BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE. However, the BAPI does not update values for condition based on percentage. Could you advice me on the mandatory fields which need to be supplied to or and config settings to be maintained to make it work? Have attached screengrab of the values I am passing.

entry.title: Re: Screen Variants and Transaction Variants with MIRO example for Functional Consutant
entry.content:
Very usefull article.

I followed all the steps you described and transported the CR into the Quality system. If I open the variants from SHD0 and OLMRLIST the changes appear, but on MIRO they do not occur.

I just tried making the VALUT field visible in the GL Account tab.

Good day

Can anyone confirm if we have RMK career site builder in PACMAN.

Regards

Prasanth P

Dear @Axel,
We already checked the link you shared. BadI's that are available can be seen in the screenshot below. They are not solving our problem. 

 


Best Regards

entry.title: Re: To make field mandatory during create, but readonly during update
entry.content: Hi @tjarliman, Any luck? I have same requirement.

entry.title: Re: PaPM Cloud - RFA to Post Accounting Document
entry.content: Hi Angelou, Thanks, we are trying to post using RFA Accounts payable item function PaPM and getting few errors related to currency assignment even though we have assigned. Is this possible to get blog with step by step for RFA vendor /Customer item function postback. would be useful

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation multiple subprocess monitoring
entry.content: We want to evaluate the feasibility of using Process Automation for creation of new products. We will have an initial form on which the user will create a list of products to be evaluated for creation. We did something similar to https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-add-sub-process-automation..html - from the initial list in the form we created an automation that create a new "subprocess" for each materials that needs to be created. Unfortunately we have not found a way to link those subprocessed created in the automation to the original process that created them in the monitoring tool. Any way to achieve that goal? I see that in the original processed (status=Completed) I see an option to Show subflow instances or Show tasks but the subprocesses created from the automation are not linked there

entry.title: Re: 7 Most Commonly Asked Questions About Package Configuration Manager for SAP SuccessFactors Solut
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Good day

Can anyone please confirm if Pacman support Recruiting Marketing ( Career site builder) module.

Regards

Prasanth P

entry.title: RFA PAPM accounts payable item function issue
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

we are trying post back from PaPM to S/4 using RFA Accounts payable line item function. however getting error-

 

No currency line item exists for line item 000000002 (parameters account GL), we tried all options but no luck.

 

we have only one currency field which was mapped already. Has anyone used this function before: do we need any additional config for this ? please suggest as we are able to post all other RFA GL/ accounts payable works

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Load method (BAPI/ FM/ IDOC) to migrate WBS element Budget data
entry.content:
Hi Yuvaraj,

I would recommend using the Fiori app Import Financial Plan Data.

You should be able to use plan category to load the type of plan data (Budget, plan values, commitments,etc.).

Here some help on it's functionality.

I hope this helps.

BR,

Filipe

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow with HCM active or not.
entry.content:
hi Lisa,

Thank you for the detailed message.

My client does not have HCM module activate. I have created a employee using maintain employee app.

The BP is created and synced with my system user id. I can see that in SU01D as well in maintain employee & BP transactions.

When i try to implement flexible workflow, my userid is still not coming. if i try to enter it says user id invalid.

In this case when the client does not have HCM active, what are the other options?

entry.title: Re: Expense Report with Vendor Details
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your mail.

The following apps are available:

Manage Customer Line Items

Display Supplier Balances

Balance Sheet/Income Statement

Is that what you're looking for?

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: #COE KKS01 SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud need of Turkey: G...
entry.content:
Dear Hazelseny,

When you say you 'need to define different Electronic delivery IDs with our own logic for Turkey Electronic Deliverys'

=> can you be more specific please on your own logic and own requirement? SAP S4HC localized solution for Turkey is compliant with local rules hopefully, hence I would need to understand what you need in addition

=> this point is relevant because I can't completely figure out if your question is a how to question or a potential product enhancement request

Regards,

Axel

entry.title: Re: RFA PAPM accounts payable item function issue
entry.content: I also could not find any SAP blog with details on RFA accounts payable item function as most of the blog covers other RFA func

entry.title: Re: ADVANCE PAYMENT -WITHHOLDING TAX
entry.content: forwarded to experts

entry.title: Re: SAP Tech Bytes: FAQ Managed Approuter vs. Standalone Approuter
entry.content:
Hello @mariusobert,

do you know what are the costs to use managed approuter instead of standalone approuter? When I subscribe to e.g. SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition?region=all&tab=service_plan&service_plan=standard&commercialModel=btpea does my deployed HTML5  Applications count as well or only when they are used inside a business site? HTML5 Repository seems to be free https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/html5-application-repository-service?region=all,  so when I just subscribe to SAP Build Workzone and dont use the features, it should be fixed fee and nothing else or?

Thanks and best regards,

Julian

entry.title: Re: SAP ALM API & Integration: Open Telemetry Support with the SAP Cloud ALM Raw Data API
entry.content:
I've recently implemented the latest SAP ALM Client and I want to call the SAP ALM log API endpoint - to log a fiori application success log, I think this is to endpoint: api/calm-logs/v1/logs

I want this to the route through and hit the open telemetry collector within SAP ALM - and then for this log to be forwarded onto our logging app ( SPLUNK ) and deleted from ALM

Is this scenario possible using the Collector detailed above from within SAP ALM ?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Special G/L indicator Decription
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for your question.

A similar question has been asked before: 
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/special-g-l-indicator-decription/qaq-p/12732895

In addition, the following Knowledge Base Article (KBA) is available: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2761212

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Partial Clearing in Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Please refer to the following documentation:

Partial Payments Versus Residual Items

Clearing Process

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Best Practice for configuring the compensation-related fields in Recruiting
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm struggling with implementing compensation information in Recruiting. For example fields like currency, base salary, monthly salary, and event reason in job applications or offer details.

The requirement is that only the Offer initiator (recruiter) and selected offer approvers can view offer details, which is why I prefer using the offer standalone fields to prevent leaking information to the Recruiting Team (recruiterGroup) or Interviewer Team (hiringmanagerGroup).

However, I encountered issues with the offer standalone fields supporting only text and textarea types, which don't display numbers with decimals and can't support object types like eventReason_obj. Consequently, I reverted all fields to Job Application and ensured these fields do not display at any stage under the multi-stage application form. I'm seeking advice on the best practices for configuring compensation fields.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Exchange Rate Conversion for Company Code Currency
entry.content: forwarded to experts

entry.title: Improvement Requests for SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In the spirit of continuous improvement of SAP Cloud ALM, I have recorded some improvement requests for SAP. You can find the list of my improvement requests below

I would be very happy if you could vote for my improvement requests.
The votes count consolidated once per company; the more companies vote, the more attention they receive at SAP.

Here ist the list with my improvement requests:

Improvement request

Link / URL

Category

Defect overview with associated test run

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/326168

Test Management

Overview of the test runs

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/326169

Test Management

Remove completed test plans from test execution

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/326172

Test Management

Additional columns in «Assign Defects Window» for Test Plan and Test Run

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/326183

Test Management

The “Team" field is missing for test cases and test execution

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/326185

Test Management

Additional fields for selecting test cases when creating a test plan

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/326186

Test Management

Missing fields and options in the Documents App for Test Cases, Team and deleted Documents

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/326196

Documentation Management

Defining mandatory fields for all elements to be documented in SAP Cloud ALM

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/326197

Documentation Management

Distribute Views and make it visible to all users

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/326202

Documentation Management

Sharing is welcome 😊

Best regards
Daniel Enderli

entry.title: Re: Inconsistencies occurred in target system when we tra...
entry.content: Note 25182 - Inconsistencies due to address transport

entry.title: How to call standard Fiori application in Mobile application through link in an email ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to call standard Fiori application in Mobile application through link in an email.

Suppose based on some workflow configurations, you will get an email for sales order details.

Example : Sales order no : 1234

and some URL Link to open the relevant order in Standard Fiori application.

Generally, sap standard fiori apps are browser based URL.

Here the requirement is once they click on the link they want to see that sales order in mobile application not in the browser.

Earlier SAP Fiori client has one application was there, now its no longer available.

Now we have seen SAP Mobile Start 

Is it possible, to open that sales order directly in mobile application instead of browser ?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Button is grey out in Define Statutory reports app
entry.content: In Run Statutory reports app the option 'Output Details' showing an error message: Form language can't be initial  In the Output Management Form Template app is the language.  Where is the language missing?

entry.title: Run Statutory reports app Output Details
entry.content:
In Run Statutory reports app the option 'Output Details' showing an error message: 

Form language can't be initial

In the Output Management Form Template app is the language. 

Where is the language missing?

entry.title: SAC Excel Addin - Formula Error
entry.content:
Hi SAC Community, 

We have designed SAC Budget Input templates on SAC Excel Addin (with similar approach of what SAP BPC EPM Excel used to do).

With this Budget data input template, user selects required entity and budget version based on SAC formula =SAP.GETDIMENSIONFILTER("Table2","Company_Code")

This formula works fine for all users but the same formula gets converted to (becomes dummy function for excel as it can not read the formula ) following =_xldudf_SAP_GETDIMENSIONFILTER("Table2","Company_Code") for few users (all users have same SAC access profile / role with Excel addin READ, WRITE, DELETE)

Please reply if similar/same issue faced by any of you and have a resolution for it. 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hello David,

I am interested in joining The digital skills initiative program for women.I took a sabbatical for almost 10years and I am keen in scaling up my SAP Skills, I would need your help on how I can enroll myself in the program, kindly guide.

 

Thank you'

Sarada.

entry.content:

I seek your guidance in mapping the following business flow within the system. Additionally, if you have any links that provide a step-by-step procedure, it would be greatly appreciated.

The flow involves creating a subcontracting purchase order for a segmented material where the vendor is another plant within the same system.

Thank you

Ravi K

entry.title: CSV file to SFTP server using SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Expert ,

I have a requirement where I am supposed to send a csv testing_Files from my local to an SFTP server in a CSV file using CPI iflow.

Any idea how may I proceed on this further?

thank you in Advance

Best Regards

entry.title: SDK Version 1400 does not support Crystal Enterprise version 1100 (FWM 02032)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we tried to upgrade Crystal Report XI R2 Server to Crystal Report Server 2020 using the Promotion Management Tool (PMT), we encountered problems. Specifically, we encountered an error stating that Crystal Enterprise version 1100 (FWM 02032) could not be supported by SDK Version 1400 if the old server (Crystal Report XI R2 server) was chosen as the source in the PMT.Next, we attempted to install Java SDK 8 on the CR 2020 server. Upon checking, we discovered that the identical process had encountered the same issue.

 

Please guide us .

Thanks

Ramesh

entry.title: Re: Stock Transfer between two EWM Managed plants assigned to same warehouse
entry.content: Hi Usman, we are having same issue. could you please let me know if you have any solution

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework
entry.content: Hi @Rene_de_Daniel and @everyone, this version of the SAP EAF has advanced the state-of-the-art, spurring interesting questions and critiques in the responses to this blog thus far. I look forward to contributing to this endeavour. Good work!

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting Automatic Payment Program - F110
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm facing issue similar as mentionned in scenario 5. We've created our own PDF form for cheque printing.

I've done 2 tests: 

1. Payment method C, PMW format: Check, form: FI_PAYM_DE_CHECK
When I launch the sapfpaym program, I'm getting this message: No payment Media Created in Format Check. 
2: Payment method C, PMW format: Check, form: ZFIFAE850015_CHECK_UK(our specific PDF form)
When I launch the sapfpaym program, I'm getting this message: FORM ZFIFAE_00498CHECK cannot be used for output management. 
Do you have any idea on what can help me resolve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Vectorize your data for Infuse AI in to Business using Hana Vector and Generative AI
entry.content: Hello Julian!! Amazing Blog!!!! I can handle the chunks ok, but when I execute the HANA_DB i get this error.

entry.title: Re: Control cycle for EWM IM managed slocs
entry.content: Hi All, could you please let me know the process

entry.title: Embracing Sustainability with SAP Ariba
entry.content:
Introduction

Sustainability has been defined as “meeting the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs” by UN World Commission on Environment and Development. In practical terms, it can mean the ability to manage natural resources well over the long term. Better processes & systems can help in managing today's needs without depleting resources or causing harm to the environment, economy, or society. Sustainability involves 3 main aspects of Environment, Socials & Economics.

  • Environmental Sustainability aims at conserving natural resources, reducing pollution, and protecting ecosystems.
  • Social Sustainability focuses on human rights, fair labor practices & seeks to ensure that everyone has equal access to resources and opportunities necessary for a healthy and fulfilling life.
  • Economic Sustainability is about creating systems and practices to balance economic development & resource use while maintaining a healthy environment.

The essence of Sustainability is to create a harmonious balance between these 3 pillars to ensure that current and future generations can thrive without compromising the planet's health or societal well-being.

From an organizational perspective, there is increasing consumer pressure on companies to target Carbon Zero Future. There are more & more regulations (like European Sustainability Reporting Standards or ESRS, Human Rights Due Diligence, Supply Chain Act Germany) to meet targets in line with Paris Agreement & COP26. Investor expectations are rising for significant Scope 3 (indirect emissions) reduction efforts. Up to 90% of a company’s environmental footprint lies in its supply chain – meaning that the supply chain represents a major opportunity for companies to further their environmental, social and governance (ESG) objectives. Refer Value chain and supply chain sustainability for details.

The purpose of this post is to highlight the topic of Sustainability for discussions. It provides brief introduction to the subject, touches upon the Sustainability solutions from SAP and provides high level inputs & resources around Sustainable Procurement with SAP Ariba.

 

SAP & Sustainability

SAP's purpose is to help the world run better and improve people's lives with sustainability at the core. In line with it, SAP offers a wide array of Sustainability solutions for its customers to embrace sustainability effectively. Solutions span across topics like ESG reporting, Climate action, Circular economy, Social responsibility, CSRD & Sustainable procurement. With these solutions, there is an opportunity to positively influence 12 of the 17 UN defined sustainability goals. Some of the prominent sustainability solutions from SAP are as below.

Green Ledger

It is a solution designed to help businesses accurately account for the carbon they produce across their value chain. It integrates environmental data into financial processes, thus enabling organizations to manage their sustainability performance as effectively as they manage the financials. For quick product overview, refer this 3 minutes video.

SAP Sustainability Footprint Management (SFM)

This solution helps businesses measure, manage, and reduce their environmental impact along the value chain. It enables organizations to calculate and track their carbon footprint, water usage, and other environmental metrics. It is a cloud application running on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). For quick product overview, refer this 2 minutes video.

SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT)

It is cloud solution to help businesses monitor and manage their sustainability performance. It helps organizations to track, analyze, and optimize their sustainability initiatives & achieve goals like reducing carbon footprint, delivering on green line performance, and meeting diversity and inclusion targets. For quick product overview, refer this 2 minutes video.

SAP Sustainability Data Exchange (SDX)

It is a solution designed to enable secure and efficient exchange of sustainability-related data between businesses and their partners. It aims to enhance collaboration, compliance & transparency across the entire supply chain by enabling organizations to share and access verified sustainability data seamlessly. It is a based on SAP Business Network & built using the technical framework of GreenToken by SAP.

It standardizes data exchange by following technical specifications of the Partnership for Carbon Transparency (PACT) framework of the World Business Council of Sustainable Development (WBSCD). It also offers interoperability with other equivalent networks using WBCSD PACT standards. Companies can use SAP SDX along with SAP Sustainability Footprint Management. Alternatively, if businesses already have a solution that calculates carbon footprints effectively, they can use SAP SDX to share this data securely. For more details on the solution, kindly refer these links.

  • Quick Product Overview (2 minutes video)
  • SAP Sustainability Data Exchange
  • SAP Sustainability Data Exchange

 

SAP Ariba & Sustainability

Adopting digitalization helps in sustainability by providing the tools and insights needed to operate more efficiently, reduce waste, and make informed decisions that benefit the environment and society.  For overall guidance on embracing Sustainability in procurement processes, refer this 10 minutes video.

Using SAP Ariba in itself reduces paper work and help with resource optimization contributing to sustainability. Also, with its wide range of solutions & strong collaboration capabilities, SAP Ariba can help an organization further to achieve its Sustainability goals while working with the supplier base. Additionally, new solutions & features help to take it even further. Below figure attempts to present various ideas through which SAP Ariba can contribute to Sustainability goals.

Embedding Sustainability in Source to Pay Process

 

Other Related Topics

Sustainable Supplier Finance

Sustainable Supplier Finance program helps & finances buyers to incentivize supplier who adopt sustainable practices. Buyers can apply a pricing benefit for suppliers who meet predefined sustainability criteria. Taulia, a SAP company, offers solution to make this effective for companies. Buyer can easily track the suppliers’ ESG performance and incentivize them to improve it. Kindly refer this link for more details.

Solution Extension - Sustainability for SAP Ariba

This solution offers SAP Ariba customers the ability to enhance functionality and integrate applications that support procurement sustainability goals. It is a Partner solution from Cordis Solutions, a partner company of excelerateds2p & is available on SAP Store. Solution is a comprehensive collection of packaged services, pre-built content, enhanced configuration, and complimentary extensions built on BTP to support a new or existing Ariba customer on their sustainability journey. For more details, refer Sustainability for SAP Ariba

Ecovadis

EcoVadis is the universally recognized assessment platform which rates businesses' sustainability based on 4 key categories: environmental impact, labor & human rights standards, ethics, and procurement practices. It provides 2 solution extensions as below for SAP Ariba which are available on SAP Store.

  • EcoVadis Business Sustainability Assessments, ESG Ratings and Carbon Scorecards

This SAP Store App for Suppliers can help them to add their sustainability rating in SAP Business Network profile. It can help Suppliers stay compliant & also boost their sales. You can also refer to this Blog Post from Amanda @amandalaldin for more details - Standing out as a sustainable supplier with SAP Business Network and EcoVadis

SAP Business Network Supplier Profile with Ecovadis Ratings

  •  EcoVadis Business Sustainability Ratings for SAP Ariba

This SAP Store App integrated with SAP Ariba Supplier Risk helps you review the ESG risk and performance of your Suppliers with robust and reliable sustainability scorecards, and take action to reduce the carbon footprint. Risk scorecard can directly be seen from the Ariba SLP Supplier 360 dashboard. This direct integration helps to make informed decisions & take positive actions based on sustainability targets resulting in higher efficiency and more sustainable value chains.

Risk Scores in SAP Ariba SLP Supplier 360

AI & Sustainability

Sustainability & Profitability go hand in hand, and AI can play a crucial role in embedding them together. SAP aims at using SAP Business AI to help customers optimize for sustainable impact across their full value chain, enabling the intelligent, sustainable enterprise, powered by the pool of foundational business data. AI can help deciding on data-driven ESG and net-zero goals, strategies, and actions. It can also help complying with regulations and automate sustainability reporting. Few existing use cases already exists and others can be build using SAP BTP. Kindly refer below resources for more details.

  • The power of sustainability, ERP, and AI - This 6 minute video explains how integrating sustainability into ERP business processes, combined with the power of SAP Business AI, can help an organization’s business decision-making to the next level and meet environmental, social, and governance compliance requirements.
  • Building AI and Sustainability Solutions on SAP BTP - This SAP Learning (learning.sap.com) Course helps building skills to infuse AI in Sustainability solutions. Its around 10 Hours in duration and is free for all.
  • Putting Sustainability at the Heart of ERP - SAP recently announced 2 new AI-driven sustainability use cases - Emission Factor Mapping with AI & ESG Report Generation with AI. This article has more details.

 

Conclusion

In today's world, sustainability is no longer an option but a necessity for organizations aiming to thrive and remain competitive. SAP Ariba provides a platform to help businesses achieve business goals while integrating sustainability into their procurement and supply chain operations. It helps businesses to make informed decisions that positively impact the environment while driving economic value.

By adopting SAP Ariba, digital transformation and sustainability can go hand-in-hand. Organizations can contribute to a more sustainable world and create long-term value for all stakeholders. In summary, embracing sustainability with SAP Ariba is not just about compliance and efficiency, it's about redefining business success in the context of our global responsibility. By embedding sustainable practices into core operations, businesses can pave the way for a more sustainable and prosperous future for all. It can help the world run better and improve people's lives with sustainability at the core.

 

Consolidated List of Resources

  • SAP's Sustainability solutions
  • UN defined sustainability goals
  • Green Ledger Overview video
  • SAP Sustainability Footprint Management (SFM) Overview video
  • SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT) Overview video
  • SAP Sustainability Data Exchange (SDX) Overview video
  • Sustainability in Procurement Processes video
  • Sustainable Supplier Finance
  • Solution Extension - Sustainability for SAP Ariba
  • EcoVadis Business Sustainability Assessments, ESG Ratings and Carbon Scorecards
  • EcoVadis Business Sustainability Ratings for SAP Ariba
  • The power of sustainability, ERP, and AI video
  • Training Course - Building AI and Sustainability Solutions on SAP BTP
  • Article - Putting Sustainability at the Heart of ERP

 

Note: Kindly refer 'Comments' for updates to the Blog Post. Also requesting readers to enter Comments with info which can be helpful to all.

entry.title: Re: The value of the 'Tax' output parameter of the formul...
entry.content:
Hi, @Felipe_Lima,

 

When using another tax code that uses the same IPI BC ICMS formula, it worked correctly.

I looked for a very similar tax code, which uses the same formulas and it worked.

The only difference is PIS and COFINS.

In green tax code, with formula IPI BC ICMS error, and in red tax code with formula worked.

Have you had any experience with this type of situation?

Regards,

 

Carlos Santos

entry.title: Re: Validate if the swift/bic field is empty through a BADI in tx fi02
entry.content:
I got it!

Thanks for your response

entry.title: Re: Common standard features not working in RAP OData V4 - S4 2022 FPS02
entry.content: I found similar differences in my RAP Application as well. the one that bothered me the most is the Child Entity Object Page is not loading in V4 version, but it loads fine in V2 Version. Any expert comments/recommendations will be appreciated

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

My name is Cephus Legall-Brickey. I am a 32 year old black male in the IT Support field currently. I have been recently coming to terms with my status as a neurodivergent individual after spending the majority of my life ignoring and underestimating its real impact.

My passion lies in the amazing versatility of technology and its applications, with an emphasis in Cybersecurity GRC. To this end I have self taught myself Sec+, Network+ and A+, as well as kept continual tabs on new an emerging computer hardware and software in the personal and enthusiast spheres. However, I have not had the resources or opportunity to realize this goal and move myself beyond consumer IT support. Now, one resource I have in temporary abundance is time, and I aim to use it to realize this career path.

Yesterday, I had a meeting with a career coach who recommended I look into SAP. I was surprised to see that its software had security and GRC applications in the corporate scene. Delving in further, I came across this initiative.

Along with a number of other resources that I have been pointed towards, I believe this initiative will allow me to officially begin a career in GRC consultation by leveraging the values of SAP software in tandem with separate cybersecurity qualifications. I would like to formally express my desire to take part and be an impactful member in the forward momentum of this community.


Thank You,

Cephus

entry.title: Re: Best way to isolate BOPF unit testing from the DB
entry.content:
Hi everyone. I am also trying to create unit tests for our BO using /BOBF/CL_TOOL_TEST_DOUBLE_SM however when I create a child class inherited from /BOBF/CL_TOOL_TEST_DOUBLE_SM the class is compiled but unit test doesn't run. I have a following warning message:

 

Syntax errors in program [/BOBF/CL_TOOL_TEST_DOUBLE_SM==CP] prevent analysis of test classes in program [ZTEST_BOBF_TD]

 

at the same time class /BOBF/CL_TOOL_TEST_DOUBLE_SM gives no syntax errors.

I also noticed that in the table TAUNIT_PROG_INFO this class has BAD_RESSOURCE /BOBF/CL_TOOL_TEST_DOUBLE_SM==CP value. I have no clue what it means too.

Did someone faced thing like this.

Here is a simple code which doesn't work in our system:

 

 

REPORT ZTEST_BOBF_TD.

class ltc_main definition for testing risk level harmless duration short.
  private section.
  methods td for testing.
endclass.

class ltc_td definition inheriting from /BOBF/CL_TOOL_TEST_DOUBLE_SM for testing.

endclass.

class ltc_main implementation.
  method td.
    new ltc_td( ).
  endmethod.
endclass.

 

 

I have also noticed that if I copy /BOBF/CL_TOOL_TEST_DOUBLE_SM to a new class like ZCL_TOOL_TEST_DOUBLE_SM one to one without any modifications, then using this new class in own scripts works very well.

Does someone have ideas why? 

Thanks!

entry.title: MDG Consolidation with active records
entry.content:
Hi MDG Experts,
We have created custom template for consolidation with Active records and strategy set as 'Remove duplicates'
After activation step, Best record is updated as per Best record calculation logic and other potential duplicate records are marked for deletion but, Is there any table to get those details like, which records are marked for deletion, which records were selected as selection step, which records were outcome of matching step ?

I am able to check activate record through Manage consolidation tile, but didn't more information through that tile.
As Process is successfully activated now, I am not see data of matching step.

Please guide here with tables/Function module to get those information.

Thanks,
Brijeshkumar

entry.title: Re: Connecting Multiple Employee Central Instances to a Single SAP S/4HANA System for Employee Data
entry.content:
Hello Paramita,

Thank you for the update.

Now reviewing this, looks great for minimaster scenaries where organizational objects are seldom used and there are no timeoff use cases. I'm trying to understand the restrictions how can be managed:

"You cannot use point-to-point replication of time management data from Employee Central in the current version if you enable this feature. You can also replicate organizational objects from only one Employee Central instance currently."

Any suggestions?

Do this means that positions, organizations, mut be managed centrally?

Thanks again!!

Rodolfo

entry.title: Re: Upload General Journal Entries - incomplete header entry
entry.content: Added S/4HANA Cloud for Finance tag, Please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: LSMW : Unable to Specify Files . Logical path incorrect ?
entry.content:
Hi,

the field 'physical path' have to be just <FILENAME> not the full path as you did. This is a placeholder to be overwritten by SAP during runtime.

entry.title: Re: SAML Configuration for BOBJ BI Launchpad (4.3 SP03).
entry.content:
Hi @liuzipeng ,

are you still facing this issue, if yes kindly check file "securitycontext.xml" located at location  <bobj install directory> /tomcat/webapps/BOE/WEB-INF.

 

Regards,

Utkarsh

entry.title: SAP: A 50-year history of success
entry.content:
On April 1, 1972, five former IBM employees - Dietmar Hopp, Hasso Plattner, Claus Wellenreuther, Klaus Tschira, and Hans-Werner Hector - started the company System Analyse Programmentwicklung (System Analysis Program Development). Their idea was to create standard enterprise software that integrated all business processes and enabled data processing in real time.

 SAP's founders and employees worked closely with customers - often sitting side-by-side with employees in customers' offices to learn their business needs and processes. By 1975. they had built applications for financial accounting (RF). invoice verification. and inventory management (RM). Some of their early customers were the nylon factory belonging to ICI in Ostringen, Germany, Knoll. Burda. Linde. and Schott. The blend of real-time data processing, standardization. and integration were the basis for SAP's transformation from a small German company into a global leader in business software. In 1979, the company started developing R/2, the second generation of its software. In 1980, SAP's roughly 80 employees moved into their first own office building in Waldorf, Germany.

From R/3 to Global Player

Even while R/2 was enjoying huge sales success and one year before SAP went public with an IPO in 1988 – the company’s managers were looking ahead to its third generation of software. The SAP R/3 success story began in 1992, with the client-server software smoothing the path to a globalized economy, turning SAP into a global player with subsidiaries and development centers across the world.

 In 1999, SAP responded to the Internet and new economy by launching its mysap.com strategy. Ten years later, the company branched out into three markets of the future: mobile technology, database technology, and cloud. To rapidly become a key player in these new domains, SAP acquired some of its competitors, including Business Objects, Sybase, Ariba, SuccessFactors, Fieldglass, and Concur.

Into the Cloud with SAP HANA

In 2011, the first customers started using the in-memory database SAP HANA. Data analyses that used to take days or even weeks were now completed in seconds. Four years later, SAP launched SAP S/4HANA, its latest generation of business software, running entirely on SAP HANA. SAP is committed to enabling every enterprise to become intelligent, networked, and sustainable – bringing together the solutions, technology, and best practices needed to run integrated, digital business processes in the cloud.

 SAP offers choice across the four largest hyperscale cloud vendors. The company’s integrated applications connect all parts of a business into an intelligent suite on a digital platform. SAP Business Technology Platform brings together application development, data and analytics, integration, and AI into one platform. It is a central element of SAP’s “RISE with SAP” offering.

 SAP has approximately 269 million cloud users currently, more than 100 solutions covering all business functions, and the largest cloud portfolio of any provider. SAP operates 57 data centers at 32 locations in 15 countries.

entry.title: Re: activate IDOC service path in S4 for IDOC receiver connection with CI
entry.content: Sounds like a reason for escalation because suggesting any form of custom handling for basic IDoc integration is ludicrous, and there is no reason to fall back to file-based IDocs when there is a perfectly viable HTTP handler available in the system.

entry.title: Re: Connect PO7.5 to Integration Suite?
entry.content: Can it be done... sure. Should it... probably not. If you are referring to certain integrations as "complicated" that suggests the existence of technical debt that you'd potentially be increasing by some multiplier.  I'd take this as an opportunity to simplify.

entry.title: Re: Common standard features not working in RAP OData V4...
entry.content: Try deploying the app. I've found, deploying a V4 RAP app resolves almost all of these.

entry.title: Re: Question for SVT Tracking Programs Using 'Initial' op...
entry.content:
Hello

first: check the OSS Note docu (check SAP marketplace)

second: check e.g. https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-members/substance-volume-tracking-using-sap-ehs-management/ba-p/13272665

Third. You need to seperate the "fill" from the "tracking" part

To use SVT the "master data" must be present. Without that: the solution us "useless" (e.g. you need to know: which material is relevant; you need to have composition data on REAL_SUB level)

Regarding tracking: you can use SVT in two basic modes: only tracking; and tracking with blocking

If the data is not "good" enough: Tracking is the best option (no blocking)

There is a "retraking" report which you can use to do "retracking" (if data is better). => Check SVT docu to finde this ABAP routine. But if the data is "really"  bad: than initial tracking is better

Wish you success in SVT

C.B.

PS: CBRC20 etc. can be used to control: what object need to be "registered". If you start with SVT you can use this option as well. BUT the tracking success depends HEAVILY on CORRECT Master Data.

entry.title: Re: How to handle References in EHS Rule Editor
entry.content:
Hello

what exactly do you try to do? Normally the Expert Rule Story is NOT used for handling "Referencing" and "Inheritance"

The issue is: what is the "rule".... Expert Rule sets are normally used to write direct data to the object (e.g. REAL_SUB).

Nether heard about the use of "Rule sets" to handle "Referencing" (using "Custom like Rule Set code).

The only exemption: if you buy ! Rules... then the "Dangerous Goods" regulations can be supported DG_CL_SUB assignments to REAL_SUB).

Can you explain what you would like to get?

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Erro na F110 para fornecedor sem imposto
entry.content: Muito obrigada pela rapidez e ajuda!
